4.solution:
Each day n: drinks 36n ml from 900ml bottle, replaces with water. Total liquid=36×(1+...+25)=36×325=11700ml.
→ All 900ml original whisky is eventually consumed. Water drunk=11700-900=10800ml.
Answer: B (10800).

5.solution:
Total V ml. Water=0.4V, P=0.35V, Q=0.25V. Porous medium absorbs water fully + some P.
→ Residual P:Q=1:2 → (0.35V-p)=0.25V/2=0.125V → p=0.225V.
→ Total absorbed=0.4V+0.225V=0.625V=250 → V=400.
→ Water absorbed=0.4×400=160 ml.
Answer: 160 ml.

8.solution:
Mix 1 (60L,40%w): water=24, milk=36. Mix 2 (90L,60%w): water=54, milk=36.
→ Combined 150L: water=78, milk=72. Add W liters water for 76% water:
→ (78+W)/(150+W)=0.76 → 78+W=114+0.76W → 0.24W=36 → W=150.
Answer: 150.

9.solution:
C1: V milk. C2: V water. Step1: Transfer 2V/3 milk to C2. C1: V/3 milk. C2: 2V/3 milk, V water.
Step2: Transfer 2/3 of C2 (=10V/9) back to C1. Milk in C1=7V/9, Water=2V/3. C2: 2V/9 milk, V/3 water.
Step3: Transfer 2/3 of C1 (=26V/27) to C2. C2: milk=20V/27, water=21V/27. Water:Milk=21:20.
Answer: D (21:20).
